description: Letter from Mūsā b. Abī l-Ḥayy (Alexandria) to Nahray b. Nissim (Fustat). Describes his tribulations due to the winter; mentions business in flax; the animals are unable to travel due to the rain and mud. He has sent a purse of 26 dinars weiging 26 1/6 dinars with the bearer Abū Naṣr al-Baghdādī, to be paid to Abū Kathīr al-Ṣayrafī, and out of which the addressee is to take 19 2/3, leaving 6 1/2 dinars. Abū l-Faraj Yeshuʿa is to add 1 1/2 dinars from Abū Manṣūr al-Zayyāt; the 8 dinars are to be paid to Abū Saʿīd Khalaf Ibn Qaṭṭūs when he arrives from Tinnīs.
description_he: מכתב ממוסא בן אבי אל-חי, אלכסנדריה, לנהריי בן נסים, פוסטאט. קשיי חורף, עסקי פשתן, ושליחת 26 דינרים.
